description: Sample fixture for DC Terminal schema/UI. Mix of illustrative public-style rows. Replace estimated/reported placeholders with filing-backed values before publishing analytics. Not a national census.

facilities.name: xAI Colossus 1
facilities.notes: Illustrative BTM sample. On-site generation MW reflects public reporting of mobile/onsite turbines serving the campus; corroborate with permits/EIA before elevating to confirmed.

facilities.name: Digital Realty IAD39
facilities.notes: Northern Virginia colocation sample; coordinates city-precision.

facilities.name: Microsoft Fairwater Atlanta — Building 2
facilities.notes: Cooling type reported from public AI campus coverage; water volumes unknown.

facilities.name: IREN Childress
facilities.notes: Crypto mining included with facility_type filter; verify MW against company filings when curating.

facilities.name: Google Council Bluffs
facilities.notes: Water figures from public summaries of Google site disclosure (avg MGD). Capacity MW intentionally unknown to demonstrate coverage honesty.

facilities.name: Meta Hyperion — Expansion (Phase 2)
facilities.notes: Large planned capacity sample; BTM unknown.

facilities.name: Fermi America — Project Matador
facilities.notes: Planned gas-backed campus often discussed as BTM; treat as reported until permits confirm.

facilities.name: EdgeCore Mesa PH03
facilities.notes: Arizona water stress context relevant for future curation.

facilities.name: Nebius New Jersey — onsite generation campus
facilities.notes: Air permit challenges reported in secondary coverage; location precision coarse on purpose.

facilities.name: Equinix DC12 (sample)
facilities.notes: Water volumes are SCHEMA DEMOS only (not Equinix-published site figures). Replace with real disclosures or set to unknown before any public launch.

facilities.name: AWS Ohio region campus (sample aggregate)
facilities.notes: Placeholder regional campus row demonstrating unknown capacity + coarse location.

facilities.name: Stargate New Mexico (sample)
facilities.notes: Pipeline/permit uncertainty noted in secondary reporting; keep status planned until construction evidence.

facilities.name: QTS Atlanta metro campus (sample)
facilities.notes: Under-construction sample distinct from named Fairwater buildings.

facilities.name: Demo Cancelled Project (OR)
facilities.notes: Synthetic cancelled row to test KPI exclusion rules.

facilities.name: Demo Confirmed BTM Campus (OK)
facilities.notes: SYNTHETIC confirmed row to exercise CONF badges and BTM confirmed KPIs. Not a real campus — remove or replace before public analytics.

facilities.name: Google The Dalles
facilities.notes: Google's first company-built campus (2006). Water figures are 2024 calendar-year city/utility records released after The Oregonian public-records case: 461.1M gal withdrawn, 361.4M gal consumed. Capacity not publicly disclosed.

facilities.name: Switch Citadel Campus (Tahoe Reno)
facilities.notes: TR1 marketed at up to 130 MW; full campus planned at 650 MW / 7.2M sq ft (corporate 'up to' figures, treated as reported). Five TR buildings mapped in OSM; row is campus-level.

facilities.name: Meta Prineville
facilities.notes: Meta's first owned campus (2011). Meta publishes fleet-wide WUE (~0.18–0.26 L/kWh) but not audited per-facility water for Prineville, so water stays unknown here. Capacity not disclosed.

facilities.name: Meta Los Lunas
facilities.notes: Served by dedicated NMRD solar plants (incl. 'NMRD Data Center III', 50 MW) via utility PPA — separate EIA plant records, so power is grid-supplied, not behind-the-meter.

facilities.name: Microsoft San Antonio campus
facilities.notes: Multi-building Westover Hills campus; Microsoft confirms operating datacenters in Bexar and Medina counties. Campus capacity not publicly disclosed.

facilities.name: Apple Mesa (Global Data & Command Center)
facilities.notes: 1.3M sq ft former GT Advanced facility, $2B conversion announced 2015, opened 2017. Associated 70 MW solar is off-site via SRP PPA, so not BTM; on-site generation unknown.

facilities.name: 350 E Cermak (Lakeside Technology Center)
facilities.notes: 1.1M sq ft carrier hotel on Chicago's Near South Side; press-reported 109 MW is total facility power capacity, not IT load — recorded as reported with that caveat.

facilities.name: Meta Gallatin
facilities.notes: Operating Sumner County campus; capacity and water not publicly disclosed at facility level.
